name: Cobblestone path
description: Single-cell-wide cobblestone path along the longer plot axis.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.pathway_cobble.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: Medieval / fortified-military motif. Coherent in medieval/castle/rustic/fantasy/gothic. Out of place in Modern, Minimalist, East-Asian, Classical/Renaissance buildings.
